def createPipeline(oakDeviceOp: oakdeviceCHOP) -> dai.Pipeline:
	"""
	Creates the DepthAI pipeline for the OAK Device.
	
	Args:
		oakDeviceOp: The OAK Device CHOP
		
	Returns:
		dai.Pipeline: The configured DepthAI pipeline
	"""
	# This example creates an RGB camera.

	pipeline = dai.Pipeline()

	# Define nodes
	camRgb = pipeline.create(dai.node.ColorCamera)
	xoutRgb = pipeline.create(dai.node.XLinkOut)

	# Stream names
	xoutRgb.setStreamName('rgb')

	# Properties
	camRgb.setPreviewSize(300, 300)

	# Linking
	camRgb.preview.link(xoutRgb.input)

	return pipeline

Blob Track TOP Callbacks

	id		- the ID of the blob
	u 		- blob x position (normalized)
	v 		- blob y position (normalized)
	width	- blob width (normalized)
	height	- blob height (normalized)
	age		- time in seconds that the blob has been active
	state   - (only in onBlobStateChange) the state of the blob: 
				'new', 'revived', 'lost', or 'expired'
"""

from typing import List, NamedTuple, Union, Optional


def onBlobTrack(blobTrackTop: blobtrackTOP, blobs: List[BlobStateEvent]):
	"""
	Called when blobs are tracked by the Blob Track TOP.
	
	Args:
		blobTrackTop: The connected Blob Track TOP
		blobs: A list of BlobData named tuples describing the tracked blobs
	"""
	return

# onBlobStateChange is triggered when the state of any blob changes
# In addition to the fields of blobs in onBlobTrack, blobs passed to the
# onBlobStateChange callback will have an additional 'state' field:
# 'new' 	- a newly tracked blob with a new id
# 'revived' - a previously lost blob that has come back to life with its old id
# 'lost' 	- a blob that is no longer tracked; lost blobs still have the
#		   potential to be revived if Revive Blobs is enabled
# 'expired' - the time spent lost exceeded Revive Time and the blob can no
#		   longer be revived
def onBlobStateChange(blobTrackTop: blobtrackTOP,
					  blobs: List[BlobStateEvent]):
	"""
	Called when the state of any blob changes.
	
	Args:
		blobTrackTop: The connected Blob Track TOP
		blobs: A list of BlobStateEvent with additional 'state' field
			indicating blob state change
	"""
	return
